name: delegate-my-work
description: Interview employees to find recurring work, map accessible AI and automation tools, and spec each loop with preferred and fallback routes.

interface.shortDescription: Find daily work AI can support
interface.longDescription: Interview employees one question at a time to identify recurring daily workflows, map which AI and automation tools they can actually access, and write buildable specs with preferred and fallback routes.
defaultPrompt: Find recurring work I can delegate to AI.
Map my tool access and suggest AI workflows.
Spec my weekly report as an AI-supported loop.
